prompt: Using the reference image of a smartphone, create a 'dos and don'ts' infographic for applying a screen protector. Show common mistakes like trapping air bubbles versus a perfectly applied protector.
prompt_refined: Display an infographic on the screen of image 1, which is a smartphone. The infographic should be a 'dos and don'ts' guide for applying a screen protector. On the left side of the phone's screen, illustrate the 'don't' scenario: a screen protector with visible, trapped air bubbles and dust particles underneath. On the right side of the phone's screen, illustrate the 'do' scenario: a perfectly applied, flawless screen protector with no air bubbles or imperfections.
objects: screen protector with visible, trapped air bubbles on the left side of the screen
dust particles underneath the screen protector on the left side of the screen
flawless screen protector on the right side of the screen
air bubbles (should not be present on the right side of the screen protector)
imperfections (should not be present on the right side of the screen protector)
